skills.label: Skills
skills.subtitle: A modern tech mix to build complete, scalable solutions

frontend.title: What you see
frontend.description: I build the interfaces you interact with: websites, apps, dashboards

backend.title: What you don't see
backend.description: The logic behind the scenes: data, APIs, automation

cms.title: Websites & Design
cms.description: Ready-to-use websites and design that works on any screen

ai.title: AI & Automation
ai.description: I use artificial intelligence to do twice the work in half the time

philosophy.label: Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: A hybrid approach that combines the depth of an agency with the speed of a freelancer. I work with you, not for you.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Every project starts with deep analysis. I understand your goals before writing a single line of code.

execution.title: Execution
execution.description: Fast development with quality. No bureaucracy, just concrete results with clear timelines.

results.title: Results
results.description: Code is just the means. What matters is the impact on your business and your users.

about.label: About
about.bio1: I'm Fabio. I write code by day and play piano, drums and guitar when I unplug. Over 4 years I've worked with different stacks, teams and industries.
about.bio2: I'm naturally curious: every project is a new opportunity to learn something, and I love a good challenge. Versatility is my strength.

music.title: Music
music.description: Piano, drums, guitar - three instruments to unplug from code and recharge creativity.

calisthenics.title: Calisthenics
calisthenics.description: Balance in everything, even upside down. Body discipline reflects in code discipline.

nomad.title: Digital nomad
nomad.description: Kayaking on lakes, concerts, travel. I work wherever there's a Wi-Fi connection.

about.workDescription: Freelancer with an agile team: zero bureaucracy, direct communication, concrete results. I like working from wherever I want, managing my own time, and putting energy into what I love outside the screen too.

projects.label: Portfolio
projects.subtitle: Real solutions for real problems. Every project is a story of collaboration and results.
projects.allSubtitle: Every project is a concrete solution to a real problem

serataPerfetta.description: Pick a budget and theme, and the app generates a complete evening plan with restaurants, cinemas, events and activities - all with real data and maps.

vibecodedTools.description: A suite of desktop tools that work offline: transcriptions, file conversions, automatic presentations and vector graphics. All local, no cloud.

counselingAcademy.description: Full website with student management, leveled courses, teaching materials and event calendar integrated with Google Calendar.

frameAboutYou.description: Photographers manage photos in real time, guests see them instantly on tablets. Works even without internet.

transcrypt.description: Record a meeting or interview, and the app transcribes it automatically on your PC. Identifies speakers and corrects errors with AI.

convertiFacile.description: Drag a file and convert it to any format: photos, PDFs, audio, video. All on your PC, no uploading anywhere.

lineArtStudio.description: Upload a photo and transform it into an SVG line art illustration. Perfect for logos, prints and graphics.

slideMaker.tagline: Presentations from photos in one click
slideMaker.description: Give it a folder of photos and it automatically creates PPTX presentations or MP4 videos with transitions, music and customizable styles.

cta.subtitle: Tell me about your idea. No commitment, no formalities - just a conversation to figure out how I can help.
